message:
fix(web): mobile UI polish - header, canvas scroll, 3D fullscreen

- Compact header buttons and phage picker on small phones (< 640px)
- Hide position badge on very small screens (< 380px)
- Add background-color to sequence canvas to prevent black flash on scroll
- Implement CSS-based fullscreen fallback for 3D viewer on iOS
  (iOS Safari doesn't support Fullscreen API for non-video elements)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
